name: Chael Sonnen

qualityWinLedger.context: Strong middleweight contender, close fight context.
Former UFC champion name, late-career/light-heavyweight context.
Major win, but outside UFC and not scored here.

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Anderson I/II do not end it because Sonnen stayed title-level and moved up to Jones. Jones closes it.

lossContextEvents.context: Sonnen remained title-level and earned another Anderson title fight.
Sonnen moved up and received the Jon Jones title fight.

lossContextEvents.type: prime upward-division elite title finish loss

shortCase: Chael is the elite no-belt agitator case: pressure wrestling, massive Anderson rivalry, and real wins over Bisping, Marquardt, Okami, and Stann.
bestArgument: He is one of the most memorable and dangerous no-belt contenders in UFC history.
counterArgument: The counter is simple: the biggest fights ended as losses.
whyRankedHere: Sonnen lands here because his middleweight contender run was real: Okami, Marquardt, Stann, and Bisping gave him one of the strongest no-belt cases in this tier.
whyNotHigher: He does not rank higher because he never won a UFC title, lost all three UFC title fights, and the biggest moments of his UFC career still ended as losses.
finalTakeaway: Chael is one of the strongest UFC no-belt personality/resume cases: memorable, dangerous, and elite — but clearly below true champion résumés.
